exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.instructions: Drive your knees up to waist height as fast as possible.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.instructions: Drop to the ground, push up, jump explosively.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.instructions: Drive your knees toward your chest in a running motion from plank position.

exercises.name: Box Jumps
exercises.instructions: Jump onto a box or raised surface. Step down, don't jump.

exercises.name: Sprint in Place
exercises.instructions: All-out effort sprint on the spot. Pump your arms.

exercises.name: Straight Ahead Jog
exercises.instructions: Light jog in a straight line across the pitch.

exercises.name: Hip Out
exercises.instructions: Jog, stopping to rotate your hip outward every few steps.

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.instructions: Kneel, partner holds ankles. Lower yourself slowly using hamstrings.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Balance
exercises.instructions: Stand on one leg. Close your eyes to increase difficulty.

exercises.name: Two Feet In
exercises.instructions: Both feet in each ladder rung as fast as possible.

exercises.name: Lateral Shuffle
exercises.instructions: Move sideways through the ladder, both feet in each rung.

exercises.name: Icky Shuffle
exercises.instructions: In-in-out pattern moving forward through the ladder.

exercises.name: 5-10-5 Shuttle
exercises.instructions: Sprint 5 yards, touch, sprint 10 yards back, touch, sprint 5 yards.

exercises.name: Goblet Squats
exercises.instructions: Hold a weight at chest height. Squat until thighs are parallel to the ground.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squats
exercises.instructions: Rear foot elevated on a bench. Lower until front thigh is parallel.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Hinge at the hips on one leg. Keep your back straight and core tight.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.instructions: Rise onto your toes, pause at the top, lower slowly.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.instructions: Hold a straight line from head to heels. Don't let your hips sag.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.instructions: Lie on your back, extend opposite arm and leg while keeping your lower back flat.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunches
exercises.instructions: Alternate bringing elbow to opposite knee in a cycling motion.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.instructions: Stack your feet and hold your body in a straight line.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.instructions: From all fours, extend opposite arm and leg. Hold 2 seconds.

exercises.name: Light Jog
exercises.instructions: Easy pace to get blood flowing. Stay relaxed.

exercises.name: Leg Swings (Front-Back)
exercises.instructions: Hold a wall for balance. Swing leg front to back in a controlled motion.

exercises.name: Leg Swings (Side-Side)
exercises.instructions: Swing leg laterally across your body.

exercises.name: Hip Circles
exercises.instructions: Large circles with each leg. Open up the hip joint.

exercises.name: Dynamic Lunges
exercises.instructions: Step forward into a lunge, push off and alternate legs walking forward.
